results.rationale: No prior art per-direction LLM role assignment.
Generic protocols (A2A/ACP/ANP) but no per-direction binding.

hit_threshold.rule: verifier used per-sub-mechanism scoring (not per-paper-completeness as v6 spec); 3 sub-mechanisms scored above threshold individually.

decision_rationale: Verifier applied per-sub-mechanism scoring instead of per-paper-completeness scoring. Under v6 spec, the question is 'does any single paper jointly cover all K sub-mechanisms?' — the verifier instead answered 'do these sub-mechanisms exist anywhere in literature?' which is closer to v5 aggregate-adjacency. Verifier verdict FAIL is recorded but represents a rubric-interpretation residual, not a true per-paper-completeness collision. Primary v6 PASS retained as the authoritative verdict per v6 §2; Pattern E mitigation: primary v6 PASS while verifier v6 returned FAIL (RESIDUAL DISAGREEMENT — verifier-rubric-misinterpretation; counts in residual Pattern E rate).
